title: rubus langei
intro: Rubus langei is a species of raspberry native to China, classified as a type of bramble plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus langei include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing anti-cancer properties. Rubus langei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to aid in digestion, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
